tracks.rawText: 0:35[Rec] Apr 23 15:28:20UploadReggaeton, A heavy, distorted kick drum and sharp snare execute the characteristic dembow rhythm at 95 BPM in the key of G minor, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern with short, percussive notes, A high-pitched, repetitive synth lead plays a staccato four-note motif, Processed male vocals deliver rhythmic, melodic phrases with heavy autotune and short delay effects, The arrangement features frequent rhythmic stops and filter sweeps on the percussion, Handclaps are layered on the snare hits during the transition, A subtle ambient pad provides harmonic texture in the background1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 23 15:28:20

tracks.rawText: 2:46PAPI [2211258218]v5.5CoverReggaeton electrónico at 95 BPM with crisp dembow, tight clap snaps, and glossy top-end, Staccato synth pluck riff, heavy sub-bass drop with sidechain pump, filtered risers, and brief beat cuts for tension, Huge epic trumpet fanfares hit the chorus over clean, polished club-ready low-end punchPublishRemix
